decks.notes: The main strategy of this deck is to control the game through countering spells and removal, while generating value through card draw and card advantage. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with efficient counterspells like Force of Negation and Mana Leak, while also answering threats with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Supreme Verdict. The deck also utilizes card advantage engines like Jace, the Mind Sculptor and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to stay ahead in resources. Additionally, the deck includes versatile cards like Snapcaster Mage and Teferi, Time Raveler to provide flexibility in different situations. Overall, this deck focuses on maintaining control over the game and out-valuing the opponent to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to use an aggressive strategy with Cloud, Midgar Mercenary as the commander. The deck includes several low-cost creatures and equipment cards to quickly build a board presence and pressure the opponent. Cards like Solitude and Skyclave Apparition provide removal options, while Mother of Runes and Giver of Runes protect key creatures. The inclusion of powerful equipment like Sword of Feast and Famine, Sword of Fire and Ice, and Umezawa's Jitte enhance the creatures' abilities and provide additional win conditions. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Drannith Magistrate and Sanctifier en-Vec to slow down the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and versatile aggro strategy.

This deck revolves around utilizing the aggressive capabilities of Spider-Man 2099 as the commander to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes a mix of powerful spells and creatures to control the board while dealing damage efficiently. Cards like Brazen Borrower, Dragon's Rage Channeler, and True-Name Nemesis provide threats that can pressure the opponent, while counterspells like Counterspell and Force of Negation help protect your own creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to maintain a fast pace and apply constant pressure to force the opponent to react defensively, all while steadily chipping away at their life total to secure victory.

This deck focuses on protecting its commander, Light-Paws, Emperor's Voice, and establishing a strong enchantment-based board presence. It utilizes a variety of low-cost white enchantments to protect its creatures, disrupt opponents' strategies, and enhance its own creatures' abilities. With efficient creature protection, card draw, and ways to pump up its creatures, this deck aims to create a resilient and evasive board state that can quickly overwhelm opponents. By combining protection, disruption, and aggression, it seeks to establish control of the battlefield and win through a combination of combat damage and commander damage.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruption spells in order to quickly establish board control. Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd serves as the commander of this Aggro archetype, with cards like Skyclave Apparition, Steel Seraph, and Mother of Runes supporting the aggressive strategy. With powerful removal spells such as Swords to Plowshares and Oust, as well as disruptive creatures like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Drannith Magistrate, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while steadily building up its own board presence. By combining efficient creatures with disruptive elements, the deck aims to apply pressure and control the game early on to secure a victory.
